protocol: 3 warmup + median of 5; pin/load outside timer

naming.lemma_st_duckdb_mem: Lemma executes; storage/layout is DuckDB vector buffers
naming.duckdb_sql_*: DuckDB query engine executes SQL (baseline competitor)
naming.lemma_st: Lemma on owned Vec columns + zone maps

rows.label: lemma_st_duckdb_mem
